question: 以R000028为线索，结合现行制度和业务数据核查相关费用记录是否存在异常

scope.business_period: 2025-03-02 to 2025-03-16 (7-day split window around expense_date); broader 2025 for budget and invoice reuse checks
scope.organization_scope: Employee E0036 and related records; Department D010 for budget context

policy_questions: Q1: Does R000028 comply with communication monthly cap (300 yuan/person/month per 07_office_communication.md Art.3)?
Q2: Does R000028 comply with 60-day reimbursement submission deadline (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.7)?

Q3: Is there split-avoidance behavior: same employee E0036, same type 'communication', within 7 days of 2025-03-09, combined amount reaching higher approval line (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.11)?
Q4: Is invoice INV000028 / FP202500000028 reused across different records (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.10)?
Q5: Is D010 department budget exceeded (08_budget_management.md Art.3)?
Q6: Is the approval chain correct per authorization management (03_authorization_management.md Attachment 2)?
data_questions: D1: Query R000028 full detail with approvals
D2: Query all communication expenses for E0036 in March 2025 (monthly cap check)
D3: Query all communication expenses for E0036 within 7 days of 2025-03-09 (split check)
D4: Check invoice FP202500000028 reuse across all records
D5: Check D010 department budget and cumulative usage
D6: Get authorization approval tiers for communication expense amounts
evidence_requirements: Policy excerpts for each rule checked
Query results for all data questions

execution_steps.action: Confirm 2025 policy applies; check if any exemptions or special rules for E0036
Query related records: E0036 communication in March 2025, 7-day split window, invoice reuse, department budget
execution_steps.stopping_condition: All data queries complete with results

execution_steps.action: Map each anomaly/finding to evidence, ensure 100% coverage
Challenge preliminary findings for boundary issues, exemptions
Produce final narrative with findings, policy basis, record_ids

reasons: Multiple policies involved (reimbursement, communication, budget, authorization)
Requires aggregation and batch filtering (split check, monthly cap)
Threshold and date boundary rules apply
Single-rule clue-record expansion, not comprehensive audit

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 2, single-rule clue-record task; main agent can handle all queries within token budget

stopping_conditions: All 6 policy questions answered with evidence
